global.description: The ad features a logo at the top, a central decorative element, and a strong call to action at the bottom.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to order with clarity about financial services.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one oval and one rectangle, rendered in a light color, centered within the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, dark text stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller line below it saying 'No hidden fees', positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Siicc Order now

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in a contrasting color, located directly below the main message text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, minimalist with bold text, EarnPath logo, main message text, and CTA.
embedding_texts.layout_text: Logo at the top, decorative shapes centered, main message text at the bottom, and CTA directly below it.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: EarnPath, Your money, clearer, No hidden fees, Order now
